languages.text: "Но если моя дочь жива — в каком бы состоянии ни оставил ее плен мерзкого ксеноса, я заберу ее с собой к ледяным звездам". {n}Себериан осекается.{/n} "Впрочем, надежда — глупое чувство, {name}".

"But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."
languages.original_text: "Но если моя дочь жива — в каком бы состоянии ни оставил ее плен мерзкого ксеноса, я заберу ее с собой к ледяным звездам". {n}Себериан осекается.{/n} "Впрочем, надежда — глупое чувство, {name}".

traits.locale_text: "But if my daughter is alive, then whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her in, I will take her with me to the ice stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

"But if my daughter is alive, then whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her in, I will take her with me to the ice stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

"But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

"But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

languages.text: "Aber sollte meine Tochter noch leben, in welchem Zustand sie in der Gefangenschaft des abscheulichen Xenos auch sein mag, werde ich sie mit zu den kalten Sternen nehmen." {n}Seberian hält inne.{/n} "Aber Hoffnung ist ein törichtes Gefühl, {name}."
languages.original_text: "But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "Aber sollte meine Tochter noch leben, in welchem Zustand sie in der Gefangenschaft des abscheulichen Xenos auch sein mag, werde ich sie mit zu den kalten Sternen nehmen." {n}Seberian hält inne.{/n} "Aber Hoffnung ist ein törichtes Gefühl, {name}."

languages.text: « Cela étant, si ma fille est en vie, quel que soit son état suite à sa captivité, je l'emmènerai avec moi dans l'immensité des étoiles. {n}Seberian s'interrompt.{/n} Mais l'espoir est un sentiment vain, {name}. »
languages.original_text: "But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

traits.locale_text: « Cela étant, si ma fille est en vie, quel que soit son état suite à sa captivité, je l'emmènerai avec moi dans l'immensité des étoiles. {n}Seberian s'interrompt.{/n} Mais l'espoir est un sentiment vain, {name}. »

languages.text: «Pero, si mi hija está viva, sin importar el estado en el que la haya dejado el cautiverio a manos del abominable xenos, me la llevaré conmigo hacia las frías estrellas». {n}Seberian se interrumpe.{/n} «Pero la esperanza es para los necios, {name}».
languages.original_text: "But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

traits.locale_text: «Pero, si mi hija está viva, sin importar el estado en el que la haya dejado el cautiverio a manos del abominable xenos, me la llevaré conmigo hacia las frías estrellas». {n}Seberian se interrumpe.{/n} «Pero la esperanza es para los necios, {name}».

languages.text: "İğrenç zenonun esaretinin onu soktuğu durum ne olursa olsun, kızım hayattaysa onu da yanımda o soğuk yıldızlara götüreceğim." {n}Seberian, sözünü yarıda kesiyor.{/n} "Fakat umut aptalca bir duygudur {name}."
languages.original_text: "But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "İğrenç zenonun esaretinin onu soktuğu durum ne olursa olsun, kızım hayattaysa onu da yanımda o soğuk yıldızlara götüreceğim." {n}Seberian, sözünü yarıda kesiyor.{/n} "Fakat umut aptalca bir duygudur {name}."

languages.text: “但如果我的女儿还活着，不管那可恶异形的囚禁将她折磨成什么样子，我都会带她一同前往冰冷的星辰。”{n}塞贝里安顿了顿。{/n}“但希望终究只是一种愚蠢的情绪，{name}。”
languages.original_text: "But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

traits.locale_text: “但如果我的女儿还活着，不管那可恶异形的囚禁将她折磨成什么样子，我都会带她一同前往冰冷的星辰。”{n}塞贝里安顿了顿。{/n}“但希望终究只是一种愚蠢的情绪，{name}。”

languages.text: 「しかし、もし娘が生きていれば、どんな状態であろうと、あの忌まわしい異星人の捕虜が彼女に残したであろう状態であろうと、私は彼女を冷たくて遠い星に連れて行くだろう。」{n}シベリアは言葉を切らした。{/n}「しかし、希望は愚かな感情だ、{name}。」
languages.original_text: "But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、もし娘が生きていれば、どんな状態であろうと、あの忌まわしい異星人の捕虜が彼女に残したであろう状態であろうと、私は彼女を冷たくて遠い星に連れて行くだろう。」{n}シベリアは言葉を切らした。{/n}「しかし、希望は愚かな感情だ、{name}。」
